title: stelis heros
intro: Stelis heros, also known as the "Heros Stelis," is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. The health benefits of Stelis heros include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, Stelis heros is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
